title: ResMed Inc. Lets Investors Breath Easy
text: ResMed is a potential opportunity for retail value investors to profit from this low-risk market leader, but there are several issues that worry us - the share price is high. The company revenue consistently grows in a niche of the healthcare device industry that will annually increase about 6% to almost $6B in revenue.

title: ResMed: Strong Earnings Growth Supports The High Valuation, Unclear Technical Trends
text: U.S. medical device equities have not been a source of safety or growth in 2022. ResMed's diversified businesses help its earnings growth outlook through 2025. The PEG ratio looks attractive.
